message:
feat(ffs-cli): switch to clap-based structured CLI (bd-2fs)

Replace ad-hoc env::args parsing with clap derive. Subcommands:
- inspect <image> [--json]: detect and display ext4/btrfs metadata
- mount <image> <mountpoint> [--allow-other]: FUSE mount (ext4 only)
- parity [--json]: show feature coverage report from ParityReport

Removed ftui dependency (unused after clap migration). Added
ffs-harness dependency for parity report access. All --json outputs
use serde_json::to_string_pretty for stable automation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
